basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iiti.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per institute norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering/Aerospace Engineering/Materials Engineering or equivalent (with first division as defined by the awarding Institute / University)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering/Aerospace Engineering/Materials Engineering or equivalent (with first division as defined by the awarding Institute / University).

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA (as per institute norms)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M. Tech. degree in Mechanical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Materials Engineering, or an equivalent qualification with a first division from a recognized institute or university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 40 years. Age relaxation may be provided as per the institute's norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q5. How is the selection process conducted for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position involves two main stages: shortlisting of eligible candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the IIT Indore JRF posts?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates are required to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions. The application process is entirely through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore is a contractual job. The appointment will be on a contract basis for the duration of the project or as specified by the institute.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates to remember for this application?
faq.answer: The crucial date to remember is the last date for application, which is 25th July 2026. The communication regarding interview dates is expected on 26th July 2026.
